codeSystems.name: ZimCountryVS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Country (Nationality) Value Set
codeSystems.description: Countries used for citizenship/nationality in Zimbabwe (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 aligned).

codeSystems.name: ZimDistrictVS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe District Value Set
codeSystems.description: Districts (and metropolitan sub-units) of Zimbabwe, coded by their 4-character district code (province + district).

codeSystems.name: ZimFacilityTypeVS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Health Facility Type Value Set
codeSystems.description: Tiers of health facility in the Zimbabwe public health system.

codeSystems.name: ZimLanguageVS
codeSystems.title: Zimbabwe Language Value Set
codeSystems.description: Official languages of Zimbabwe (per the 2013 Constitution, Section 6), expressed as BCP-47 codes.
